creator: eric@ovafactory.com
text:
Patch looks great. Thanks!

I am the owner of eric@FreeBSD.org and was a committer for many years in the early 2000s. I have been talking to project cluster administrators and trying to reclaim my account, though I need someone to vouch for me and it has been a bit of a trying experience as many of my old FreeBSD friends are no longer involved or unresponsive. It would be great to get back to contributing.
